calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. 1. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery granted; Roberto S. Perez, individually and dba L & L Hawaiian BBQ shall serve full, complete and verified answers to plaintiff's post-judgment interrogatories, and responses to plaintiff's post-judgment demand for production of documents within ten days of the date of this order; all objections are waived, with the exception of attorney-client and attorney-work product privilege
2. Request For Award Of Sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the total sum of $290.00. Imposition of sanctions is stayed for ten days from the date of this order; if defendant serves discovery responses as ordered, sanctions shall be permanently stayed.
Prevailing party to submit form of order.
Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
